title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Skills
summary: Austin Marchese presents five lessons on how Anthropic employees use Claude Skills, extracted from Anthropic's published materials. He argues that Skills are more than markdown files and should be built as a compounding system, covering categories, power components, verifiers, gotchas, and triggers.
writeup: Austin Marchese distills five lessons from Anthropic's published materials on how its employees use Claude Skills. The central claim is that Skills are more than markdown files and work best when built as a compounding system. The video covers categories of Skills, power components, verifiers, common gotchas, and triggers. It matters because it reframes Skill design as an accumulating engineering practice rather than one-off prompts.
